note: Fully accessible with lifts, step-free entrance, free disabled entry plus companion and loaner wheelchairs. Flat galleries; large but navigable.
Modern museum with glass lifts to all floors, accessible entrance and free disabled entry. Step-free throughout.
Large park with wide paved and firm paths, the accessible Crystal Palace and boating lake; some gravel and gentle slopes but broadly easy for strollers and wheels.
An accessible route with lifts covers the main State Rooms, but there are some steps and the grand staircase; the courtyard is cobbled. Partly accessible — call ahead.
The grand arcaded square is reached through stepped archways though ramped entrances exist; the interior is flat but cobbled. Manageable via the level access points.
Central, mostly flat and recently repaved pedestrian plaza; step-free and easy though always crowded.
The Egyptian temple sits in a flat park with paved approaches and famous sunsets; the immediate surrounds are step-free, with a gentle rise up to it.
A historic covered market at street level but extremely crowded and tight between stalls; wheeling or a stroller is difficult at busy times. Quieter early.
Accessible entrance and lifts to all floors with free disabled entry; step-free and calmer than the Prado.
Madrid's grand avenue has wide, smooth, flat pavements ideal for strolling, shopping and theatre; easy for wheels and strollers though busy.
Recently redesigned flat, green, step-free plaza with smooth paths and shade; easy and pleasant for families and seniors.
